description: Newton's laws of motion and related forces including net force, acceleration, weight, and friction.

variable_sub.name: Net Force
variable_sub.description: The total force acting on an object.

variable_sub.name: Mass
variable_sub.description: A physical quantity representing the amount of matter in an object.

variable_sub.name: Acceleration
variable_sub.description: A physical quantity representing the rate of change of velocity with respect to time.

variable_sub.name: Gravity
variable_sub.description: The acceleration due to gravity near the surface of a planet.

variable_sub.name: Weight
variable_sub.description: The gravitational force acting on an object.

variable_sub.name: Friction Force
variable_sub.description: The force that resists relative motion between two surfaces in contact.

variable_sub.name: Coeff. of Friction
variable_sub.description: A dimensionless quantity representing the ratio between frictional force and normal force.
